success.comment: Cheerful ascending notes for successful connection

room_connection.comment: Very fast dual notes for room connection chime

peer_connection.comment: Fast ascending sequence for peer connection chime

error.comment: Two simultaneous interval chords for error notifications

_example_midi_file.comment: MIDI file playback is a future feature - currently falls back to default note

_instructions.comment: See CHIMES.md for full documentation on customizing chimes. Use + to play simultaneous notes.
